<head id="ctl00_Head1">
    

<style type="text/css">
       html,body
{
background:none !important;
}
#overlay
{
Position: fixed;
z-index: 99;
top: 0px;
left: 0px;
background-color: #FFFFFF;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
filter: Alpha(Opacity=80);
opacity:0.80;
}
#theprogress{
background-color: transparent;
width: 200px;
height: 200px;
text-align: center;
filter: Alpha(Opacity=100);
opacity:1;
}
#modalprogress
{
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
left: 50%;
margin: -11px 0 0 -55px;
color: white;
}         
Body>#modalprogress
{
Position:fixed;
} 
</style>
